---
title: "A view behind the scenes: Data structures and software architecture of a VAA"
author: "Djouvas, C., and Tsapatsoulis, N."
date: 2014-01-01
description: "9th IEEE International Workshop on Semantic and Social Media Adaptation and Personalization (SMAP 2014), 136–141"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/conference.png
---
